0.question: How fast can I be live?
0.answer: Most teams are live within minutes. Connect your number, configure your workflows, run a test, and go live. You can refine sequences and agent behavior after you see it working.

1.question: ¿Cómo empiezo?
1.answer: Regístrate y comienza en menos de 3 minutos. Todos los planes incluyen acceso completo a todas las funciones.

2.question: Can I use my existing business number?
2.answer: Yes. Keep your current number and forward to Revenue Operator, or provision new numbers directly.

3.question: What exactly does Revenue Operator do?
3.answer: Revenue Operator is an AI revenue operations platform. It handles inbound and outbound communication, automated follow-up sequences, appointment booking, lead qualification, escalation to your team, and full revenue attribution. Think of it as the execution layer that runs your revenue operations automatically.

4.question: Does the AI sound robotic?
4.answer: Not even close. Revenue Operator uses 32 premium AI voices engineered with natural pauses, real intonation, pitch variation, and conversational warmth. Play a sample on our voice preview above and judge for yourself.

5.question: Who is this for?
5.answer: Any business or team that generates revenue through conversations. Solo consultants, sales teams, agencies, service businesses, clinics, law firms, real estate teams, recruiters, multi-location operators, and more. If you have leads, appointments, or follow-up to manage, Revenue Operator runs it.

6.question: Do I need to replace my CRM?
6.answer: No. Revenue Operator is the execution layer that sits on top of your CRM. It handles communication, follow-up, booking, and attribution. Your CRM stays as your system of record.

7.question: How do you prevent bad automation?
7.answer: Every agent has configurable guardrails: per-contact frequency limits, business hours enforcement, opt-out compliance, confidence thresholds, and human escalation rules. You can require approval before any action executes. Every action is logged and reviewable.

8.question: Does this work for outbound too?
8.answer: Yes. Revenue Operator supports 10 outbound campaign types including speed-to-lead, appointment setting, reactivation, quote follow-up, and cold outreach. Outbound runs with the same guardrails, compliance, and attribution as inbound.

9.question: How is ROI measured?
9.answer: Every call, follow-up, and booking is attributed to revenue outcomes. Your dashboard shows exactly what the system produced, broken down by workflow, campaign, and agent. Weekly digest emails summarize performance.

10.question: What if the AI makes a mistake?
10.answer: Full transparency. Review transcripts and recordings for any call. Adjust agent behavior, scripts, and escalation rules in real time. Run agents in sandbox mode to preview before going live. Every action has an audit trail.

quickStart.description: Configura Revenue Operator en unos 5 minutos: regístrate, añade los datos de tu negocio, configura tu agente IA, conecta tu número y haz una llamada de prueba.
